headline: Assessing International Paper (IP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Why International Paper Is On Investors’ Radar International Paper (IP) has been drawing attention after a stretch of weak share performance, including a roughly 24% decline over the past month and a negative total return over the past year. With the stock last closing at US$37.25 and the company reporting annual revenue of US$23.63b alongside a net loss of US$2.84b, investors are weighing how its packaging business and value profile fit into their portfolios. See our latest analysis for...
